Jongeun Park
Research CV Teaching Resources

Into the Light (2006)

Available on Spotify, iTunes, Fresh Sound New Talent, Amazon

Tracklist

  1. All The Things You Are (Kern) 8:38
  2. Fumes (Irwin) 7:56
  3. In the 90’s (Irwin) 5:44
  4. Into the Light (Irwin) 7:38
  5. So In Love (Porter) 10:19
  6. The Point (Irwin) 8:20
  7. The Anti-Hero (Irwin) 4:32
  8. Ugly Beauty (Monk) 5:23

Production

  • Recorded in Brooklyn on August 16 and 18, 2005
  • Executive producer: Jordi Pujol
  • Released in 2006 on Fresh Sound New Talent
  • Performers
    • Aaron Irwin (alto sax)
    • Ryan Scott (guitar)
    • Matt Clohesy (bass)
    • Greg Ritchie (drums)
    • Rich Perry (tenor sax)
